name: change-none-msg
instruction: Modify `find_product` so that when the product is not found, it returns `"Product 'TARGET' not found"` instead of `"not found"`, where TARGET is the `target` parameter. Use string interpolation: `"Product '${target}' not found"`. Keep the found case unchanged. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. String interpolation: `"${expr}"`. Variables from the enclosing scope are accessible inside closures and match arms.
